versioning_decision: Bumped the specification to 1.3.0. Section 8.1 defines protocol versions as major.minor and says minor versions are for backward-compatible additions; embedded context content is additive and all new fields are optional, so the current 1.2.4 draft advances to the next minor protocol version.

canary.codeword_location: test-bundles/interop-level-0/embedded-content-canary.md context item embedded-canary-context content_b64 payload; answer key in test-bundles/interop-level-0/test-queries.json

findings: The embedded canary payload decodes to 61 bytes and matches the declared SHA-256 hash.
deliberately_not_done: Did not touch TEZ_INTERROGATION_PROTOCOL.md, schemas/tip-*.json, test-bundles/interop-level-3/, or test-bundles/tip-compliance/.
Did not make embedded-content canary queries mandatory for implementations that do not support embedded content.
